title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindalco Industries

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Hindalco Industries
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
